---
title: "Kansas Board of Regents"
project-title: "Kansas Board of Regents"
year: "2024"
partner: "Kansas Board of Regents"
datacategory:
  - "Social Science"
keyword:
  - "Education"
datatype: "Tabular Data"
---

```{=html}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_description_style.css">

<div class="container">
    <!-- The header is now simpler as Quarto handles the title -->
    <header class="project-header">
        <p class="tagline">Project Description</p>
        <h2>{{< meta project-title >}}</h2>
        <p class="subtitle">
            A partnership with <a href="https://www.kansasregents.gov/">{{< meta partner >}}</a> to understand and address a key community challenge.
        </p>
    </header>

    <!-- Main Grid Container -->
    <div class="main-grid">
    
        <!-- Project Details & Resources Section -->
        <div class="top-grid">
            <!-- Project Details Card (Content is now from YAML) -->
            <div class="card">
                <h3 class="card-title">Project Details</h3>
                <ul class="details-list">
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-people-fill icon"></i>
                        <div>
                            <strong>Community Partner:</strong>
                            {{< meta partner >}}
                        </div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                       <i class="bi bi-tags-fill icon"></i>
                        <div>
                            <strong>Data Categories:</strong>
                            {{< meta datacategory >}}
                            <strong>Keywords:</strong>
                            {{< meta keyword >}} 
                            <strong>Data Type:</strong>
                            {{< meta datatype >}} 
                        </div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill icon"></i>
                        <div>
                            <strong>Project Year:</strong>
                            {{< meta year >}}
                        </div>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <!-- Project Resources Card (Update links as needed) -->
            <div class="card">
                <h3 class="card-title">Project Resources</h3>
                <div class="resource-buttons">
                    <a href="../datasets/data_KBOR.html" class="btn btn-primary">
                        <i class="bi bi-clipboard-data-fill icon"></i> Explore the Dataset
                    </a>
                    <a href="../classplan/class_KBOR.html" class="btn btn-secondary">
                       <i class="bi bi-book-half icon"></i> View the Class Plan
                    </a>
                    <a href="CDL_Proposal_KBOR.pdf" class="btn btn-tertiary">
                        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill icon"></i> Original Proposal (PDF)
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

:::::: card
## <i class="bi bi-question-circle-fill icon"></i> The Challenge

::: conetent-text
Using successive waves of the Survey of College Graduates, analyze how students who attended a community college fare post-graduation. There is evidence of a community college penalty for degree attainment and this project seeks to analyze whether students who attend a community college in the course of their academic career and attain a baccalaureate degree face a career or wage penalty compared to their peers who attain a baccalaureate degree but never attended a community college full-time.
:::

:::: content-section
## <i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line-fill icon"></i> Key Findings & Results

::: results-placeholder
<iframe src width="100%" height="600px" style="border:none;">

</iframe>
:::
::::
::::::
